response.step_by_step_log: OCR identified '世界は恋に落ちている' in the video. Performed a search with "Sekai wa Koi ni Ochiteiru CHiCO with HoneyWorks Japanese and English lyrics". The song title is "Sekai wa Koi ni Ochiteiru". Original artist is CHiCO with HoneyWorks. The performer is Yuzuki Choco. Song is in Japanese. The video segments were split into a musical performance and a later dialogue/merchandise showcase.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a vocal performance of "Sekai wa Koi ni Ochiteiru" by Yuzuki Choco (and another VTuber), followed by a dialogue segment discussing birthday merchandise.

scenes.description: Two VTubers perform a choreographed dance and song on a brightly decorated virtual stage. Title '世界は恋に落ちている' is displayed.
scenes.song_title: 世界は恋に落ちている
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
世界は恋に落ちている
光の矢 胸を刺す
全部わかりたいんだよ
「ねえ、聞かせて」
すれ違う言葉に
ちょっとだけの後悔
涙こぼれて
忙しい感情
鼓動にリンクするチューニング
確かめたいんだ
目的ばかりに捕らわれて
大事なものが霞んで見えて
世界は恋に落ちている
君をわかりたいんだよ
「ねえ、教えて」
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The world is falling in love, the arrow of light strikes my chest
I want to understand everything, "Hey, tell me"
The fleeting regrets of crossed words
Tears spill, hurried emotions
Linking to the heartbeat, checking the tuning
I want to make sure, caught up in the purpose
The important things seem hazy
The world is falling in love
I want to understand you, "Hey, tell me"
